headline: Former Visa Executive Behind VAMP Joins QuickRefund as Chief Risk Intelligence Officer
summary: Kolin Whitley, a key figure behind VAMP, joins QuickRefund to help merchants navigate the system he helped build.BOCA RATON, Fla., April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- QuickRefund, a merchant risk and dispute prevention platform focused on reducing fraud and chargebacks before they impact compliance metrics, today announced that Kolin Whitley has joined the company as Chief Risk Intelligence Officer (CRIO).
